title: Possible command injection via Process.Start - mRemoteNG

body_snippet:
Find more live information in Aikido here: https://app.aikido.dev/repositories/1001230?sidebarIssue=16286739&groupId=38189&sidebarIssueTask=3468757&sidebarTab=tasks


### Scope
These issues affect the following code repository:
- mRemoteNG:
	**[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**
	**[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**
